2603.17295.title: Directing the Narrative: A Finetuning Method for Controlling Coherence and Style in Story Generation
2603.17295.paper_summary: Story visualization requires generating sequential imagery that aligns semantically with evolving narratives while maintaining rigorous consistency in character identity and visual style. However, existing methodologies often struggle with subject inconsistency and identity drift, particularly when depicting complex interactions or extended narrative arcs. To address these challenges, we propose a cohesive two-stage framework designed for robust and consistent story generation. First, we introduce Group-Shared Attention (GSA), a mechanism that fosters intrinsic consistency by enabling lossless cross-sample information flow within attention layers. This allows the model to structurally encode identity correspondence across frames without relying on external encoders. Second, we leverage Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to align generated outputs with human aesthetic and narrative standards. Unlike conventional methods that rely on conflicting auxiliary losses, our approach simultaneously enhances visual fidelity and identity preservation by learning from holistic preference data. Extensive evaluations on the ViStoryBench benchmark demonstrate that our method establishes a new state-of-the-art, significantly outperforming strong baselines with gains of +10.0 in Character Identity (CIDS) and +18.7 in Style Consistency (CSD), all while preserving high-fidelity generation.
2603.17295.paper_summary_zh: 故事視覺化需要生成與不斷演變的敘事語義一致的連續影像，同時保持角色身份和視覺風格的嚴謹一致性。<lb/>然而，現有的方法論在主題不一致和身份漂移方面往往面臨挑戰，特別是在描繪複雜互動或延長敘事弧時。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一個連貫的兩階段框架，旨在實現穩健且一致的故事生成。<lb/>首先，我們介紹了群體共享注意力（Group-Shared Attention, GSA），這是一種通過在注意力層內啟用無損的跨樣本信息流來促進內在一致性的機制。<lb/>這使得模型能夠在框架之間結構性地編碼身份對應，而無需依賴外部編碼器。<lb/>其次，我們利用直接偏好優化（Direct Preference Optimization, DPO）來使生成的輸出與人類的美學和敘事標準對齊。<lb/>與依賴相互矛盾的輔助損失的傳統方法不同，我們的方法通過從整體偏好數據中學習，同時增強視覺真實性和身份保留。<lb/>在ViStoryBench基準上的廣泛評估表明，我們的方法建立了新的最先進技術，顯著超越強基準，在角色身份（Character Identity, CIDS）上提高了+10.0，在風格一致性（Style Consistency, CSD）上提高了+18.7，同時保持高保真生成。
2603.17295.author: Jianzhang Zhang et.al.
2603.17295.authors: Jianzhang Zhang, Yijing Tian, Jiwang Qu, Chuang Liu
